metadata.architecture_summary: Dense causal decoder-only Transformer with GeLU FFN, parallel Attention/FFN blocks, full-context eight-KV-head multigroup GQA, RoPE, and tied input/output embeddings.

architecture.attention_variant: multigroup GQA with one KV head per training tensor-parallel rank

metadata.parameter_count_convention: Counts matrix weights executed for one Decode token. Per layer, QKV parameters are hidden_size * (hidden_size + 2 * kv_heads * head_dim), attention output is hidden_size squared, and the two GeLU FFN matrices total 8 * hidden_size squared. The shared 65024-row embedding is counted once as the full LM head, while input lookup is represented by one BF16 row read. LayerNorm parameters, elementwise GeLU/RoPE, attention softmax, logits materialization, and implementation padding are excluded.

precision_profile.weight_precision_evidence: The released checkpoint is BF16 and the official 2023 inference example loads it with torch_dtype=torch.bfloat16.
precision_profile.kv_precision_evidence: The official BF16 inference path executes projected keys and values in BF16 and does not specify a separate cache quantization cast, so the retained KV state is modeled as BF16.
precision_profile.contemporary_alternative_profiles: The 2023 Hugging Face release also demonstrated bitsandbytes 8-bit and 4-bit/GPTQ inference. They are not additional model samples; this flagship resource-envelope configuration uses the native BF16 reference path.

metadata.context_note: 2048 is the published training and native sequence length. Transformers 4.33 exposed optional RoPE scaling, but no particular extended-context Falcon-180B release is part of this profile.
metadata.attention_note: Falcon calls this scheme multigroup multiquery attention: Falcon-180B keeps eight independent KV heads, one per training tensor-parallel rank. On the logical superchip it is exactly represented as full-context GQA with 232 query heads and 8 KV heads.
metadata.implementation_note: FlashAttention and physical tensor-parallel layout affect kernel traffic and communication, not the logical full-context Decode FLOPs or KV capacity modeled here; they are outside this baseline.
